nasb.text: Give to everyone who asks of you, and whoever takes away what is yours, do not demand it back.

esv.text: Give to everyone who begs from you, and from one who takes away your goods do not demand them back.

cnv.text: 向你求的，就給他；有人拿去你的東西，不用再要回來。

ccb.text: 有人向你求什么，就给他；有人拿了你的东西，不要追讨。

csbs.text: 任何人求你，都要给他；有人拿走你的东西，不要讨回来。
